storyBeat: {catName} 跳上矮牆,沙漠夜風吹進院子

questions.sentence: Tonight the wind is dry and warm.
questions.question: How is the wind tonight?
questions.explanationZh: dry = 乾燥的。今晚的風從遠方沙漠吹來,跟以前的潮風不一樣。

questions.sentence: The night smells like sand.
questions.question: What does the night smell like?
questions.explanationZh: sand = 沙。風裡帶著一點沙的味道,我從沒聞過。

questions.sentence: I jump up on the wall.
questions.question: What does {catName} do to the wall?
questions.explanationZh: jump = 跳。短 u 音,跟 jog/drop/drip 的母音都不一樣。打字練聽。

questions.sentence: I feel curious about the story.
questions.question: How do I feel?
questions.explanationZh: curious = 好奇的。奶奶今晚翻到沒見過的那頁,我也想聽。

questions.sentence: Where is the desert wind from?
questions.question: Where does tonight's wind come from?
questions.explanationZh: from a desert = 從沙漠來。奶奶說今晚的故事就發生在沙漠裡。

storyBeat: {dogName} 趴在腳邊,奶奶翻到沙漠那一頁

questions.sentence: {dogName} lies at her feet.
questions.question: Where does {dogName} lie?
questions.explanationZh: at her feet = 在她腳邊。柴犬永遠的位置,離奶奶最近。

questions.sentence: Grandma opens an old book.
questions.question: What is the book like?
questions.explanationZh: old = 舊的。封皮已經磨毛了,奶奶說這本書比她還老。

questions.sentence: She turns the page slowly.
questions.question: What does Grandma slowly turn?
questions.explanationZh: page = (書的)頁。/eɪdʒ/ 結尾,跟 pace /eɪs/、pad /æd/ 不同。

questions.sentence: {dogName} feels sleepy already.
questions.question: How does {dogName} feel?
questions.explanationZh: sleepy = 想睡的。{dogName} 還沒聽完開頭眼皮就垂了。

questions.sentence: What page does Grandma open?
questions.question: What page is Grandma reading?
questions.explanationZh: a desert page = 沙漠那一頁。今晚的故事就從這裡開始。

storyBeat: 奶奶說 "O Best Beloved" 開場

questions.sentence: She says, "O Best Beloved, listen."
questions.question: Whom is Grandma speaking to?
questions.explanationZh: O Best Beloved = 我最親愛的(聽眾)。奶奶照書直接對我們說話,像在面前一樣。

questions.sentence: This is a tale from long ago.
questions.question: When did this story happen?
questions.explanationZh: long ago = 很久以前。Kipling 的故事都從「世界剛開始」說起。

questions.sentence: I will tell you a story.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 正確順序:I → will → tell → you → a → story。fast / loud 是干擾。

questions.sentence: I sit still and listen.
questions.question: How do I sit?
questions.explanationZh: still = 不動的。耳朵豎起來,尾巴不甩,聽奶奶說。

questions.sentence: Why does the book say "O Best Beloved"?
questions.question: Why does Kipling write "O Best Beloved"?
questions.explanationZh: Kipling 用第二人稱 you,直接把讀者當成「最親愛的聽眾」拉進故事。這是這章的特色聲音。

storyBeat: At the beginning of the world (新世界開頭)

questions.sentence: This was the beginning of the world.
questions.question: When did the story happen?
questions.explanationZh: at the beginning of the world = 在世界剛開始的時候。Kipling 的招牌開場。

questions.sentence: The animals began to work for Man.
questions.question: Whom do the animals work for?
questions.explanationZh: Man = 人類(這裡指全人類,大寫像專有名詞)。當時動物剛開始替人類做事。

questions.sentence: The Horse had his saddle.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:The → Horse → had → his → saddle。dog / tail 是干擾。saddle = 馬鞍。

questions.sentence: The Dog had his collar.
questions.question: What does the Dog wear?
questions.explanationZh: collar = 項圈。/ˈkɒlər/,跟 color /ˈkʌlər/、caller /ˈkɔːlər/ 母音不同。

questions.sentence: Everyone is busy at work.
questions.question: How is everyone?
questions.explanationZh: busy = 忙的。馬、狗、牛都在做自己的工作,只有一個還沒上工。

questions.sentence: What do the Horse and Dog already do?
questions.question: What are the Horse and Dog doing?
questions.explanationZh: working for Man — 馬有鞍、狗有圈,牠們已經開始幫人類工作了。

storyBeat: The Camel lives in the Howling Desert (駱駝住沙漠)

questions.sentence: A Camel lives in the desert.
questions.question: Where does the Camel live?
questions.explanationZh: in the desert = 在沙漠裡。沙、風、太陽,什麼都很多,就是沒有水。

questions.sentence: The desert is hot and dry.
questions.question: What is the desert like?
questions.explanationZh: hot = 熱的。沙漠白天很熱,連風都是熱的。

questions.sentence: He is very lazy.
questions.question: How is the Camel about work?
questions.explanationZh: lazy = 懶的。/ˈleɪzi/,結尾是 -zy,別跟 lacy /ˈleɪsi/ 混了。

questions.sentence: The Camel just stands and eats.
questions.question: What does the Camel do all day?
questions.explanationZh: stand and eat = 站著吃。一整天就這樣,什麼活都不幹。

questions.sentence: He does not want to work.
questions.question: Does the Camel want to work?
questions.explanationZh: No — 一點都不想。這就是 Kipling 故事的衝突點。

questions.sentence: Why does the Camel stay in the desert?
questions.question: Why does the Camel stay in the desert?
questions.explanationZh: to avoid work = 為了躲工作。沙漠遠又熱,別的動物不來找他,他就能繼續懶。

storyBeat: Monday: Horse asks Camel to trot

questions.sentence: On Monday the Horse came to him.
questions.question: What day was it?
questions.explanationZh: Monday = 星期一。Kipling 用三天逐步堆疊,每天一隻新動物來。

questions.sentence: Camel, come and trot with us.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:Camel → come → and → trot → with → us。trot = 小跑,馬的動作。

questions.sentence: The Horse wants to trot together.
questions.question: What does the Horse want?
questions.explanationZh: to trot = 小跑步。馬希望駱駝跟牠一起跑。

questions.sentence: The Horse is friendly and kind.
questions.question: How is the Horse?
questions.explanationZh: friendly = 友善的。馬不是來罵駱駝,是來邀請他一起的。

questions.sentence: The Camel only said, "Humph!"
questions.question: What does the Camel say?
questions.explanationZh: Humph = 駱駝的拒絕聲(中文像「哼!」)。注意拼字結尾是 -mph,Kipling 故意造的字。

questions.sentence: What does "Humph!" mean from the Camel?
questions.question: What does "Humph!" mean here?
questions.explanationZh: No, I won't = 我不要。駱駝沒說整句,但「哼」就是拒絕的意思,後面整章他都這麼回。

storyBeat: "Humph!" — the Camel refuses (拒絕一)

questions.sentence: The Camel only says, "Humph!"
questions.question: What does the Camel say?
questions.explanationZh: Humph = 哼。Kipling 用同一個字三次拒絕,聲音記得越牢越好。

questions.sentence: He says no more than that.
questions.question: How much does the Camel say?
questions.explanationZh: no more = 不多。一個字「Humph」就完,駱駝懶得多講。

questions.sentence: The Horse goes away sad.
questions.question: How does the Horse leave?
questions.explanationZh: sad = 難過的。馬好心邀請,被一個「哼」打發走,心裡不好受。

questions.sentence: The Camel feels proud of his "Humph!"
questions.question: How does the Camel feel?
questions.explanationZh: proud = 得意的。駱駝覺得「哼」一聲就把人打發走很神氣。

questions.sentence: Why does the Camel say only "Humph!"?
questions.question: Why only "Humph!"?
options: he does not want to talk
questions.explanationZh: he does not want to talk = 他不想說話。一個字就是「我不要,別煩我」。

questions.sentence: What does the Horse think of this answer?
questions.question: What does the Horse think?
questions.explanationZh: rude = 沒禮貌的。馬覺得駱駝不只懶,還很沒禮貌,連好好回話都不肯。

storyBeat: Tuesday: Dog asks Camel to fetch (狗來邀請)

questions.sentence: On Tuesday the Dog came to him.
questions.question: What day was it?
questions.explanationZh: Tuesday = 星期二。第二天換狗來邀請,Kipling 用三天節奏推進。

questions.sentence: The Dog has a stick in his mouth.
questions.question: What is in the Dog's mouth?
questions.explanationZh: a stick = 一根樹枝。狗工作的招牌道具,叼著就是要玩 fetch。

questions.sentence: Camel, come and fetch with me.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:Camel → come → and → fetch → with → me。fetch = 把東西叼回來。now / loud 是干擾。

questions.sentence: The Dog asks him to carry too.
questions.question: What does the Dog ask the Camel?
questions.explanationZh: carry = 搬運。/ˈkæri/ 短 a,跟 marry /ˈmæri/ 拼字像但意思不同,curry 母音 ʌ 也錯。

questions.sentence: The Dog wags his tail kindly.
questions.question: How does the Dog look?
questions.explanationZh: kind = 友善的。狗跟馬一樣,是好心來邀請,不是來罵人。

questions.sentence: The Camel only said, "Humph!"
questions.question: What does the Camel say again?
questions.explanationZh: Humph = 哼。第二次了,還是同一個答案。

storyBeat: "Humph!" again (拒絕二)

questions.sentence: The Dog feels angry now.
questions.question: How does the Dog feel?
questions.explanationZh: angry = 生氣的。狗本來很 friendly,被「哼」一聲打發,牙齒咬緊。

questions.sentence: The Dog drops his stick.
questions.question: What does the Dog drop?
questions.explanationZh: drops his stick = 把樹枝丟下。狗放棄邀請,扭頭就走。

questions.sentence: The Camel goes back to eat grass.
questions.question: What does the Camel do?
questions.explanationZh: eat grass = 吃草。沒有人邀請了,駱駝繼續站著吃。

questions.sentence: The Camel feels free and lazy.
questions.question: How does the Camel feel?
questions.explanationZh: lazy = 懶的。沒人煩,他覺得這樣的生活最舒服。

questions.sentence: Why is the Dog angry?
questions.question: Why is the Dog angry?
questions.explanationZh: the Camel said no = 駱駝拒絕了。狗特意走來邀請,卻被「哼」打發。

questions.sentence: What do we learn about the Camel by now?
questions.question: What kind of animal is the Camel?
questions.explanationZh: very lazy = 非常懶。兩次拒絕,兩次「哼」,我們已經看清他了。

storyBeat: Wednesday: Ox asks Camel to plough (牛來邀請)

questions.sentence: On Wednesday the Ox came to him.
questions.question: What day do you hear?
questions.explanationZh: Wednesday = 星期三。/ˈwenzdeɪ/,第一個 d 不發音,常考發音陷阱。

questions.sentence: The Ox has a yoke on his neck.
questions.question: What is on the Ox's neck?
questions.explanationZh: yoke = 牛軛(綁在牛脖子上拉犁的木架)。Y 開頭四個字裡只有它是工具。

questions.sentence: Camel, come and plough with us.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:Camel → come → and → plough → with → us。plough(美式 plow)= 犁田。

questions.sentence: The Ox works the field for Man.
questions.question: Whom does the Ox work for?
questions.explanationZh: for Man = 為人類。三隻動物都一樣,只有駱駝還沒上工。

questions.sentence: The Ox is patient and slow.
questions.question: How is the Ox?
questions.explanationZh: patient = 有耐心的。牛工作慢,但從來不抱怨,跟駱駝完全相反。

questions.sentence: The Camel only said, "Humph!"
questions.question: What does the Camel say a third time?
questions.explanationZh: Humph = 哼。第三次同一個字 — 這就是 Kipling 故意要小朋友記起來的節奏。

storyBeat: "Humph!" the third time (拒絕三)

questions.sentence: How many times has the Camel said "Humph!"?
questions.question: How many "Humph!" so far?
questions.explanationZh: three = 三次。Monday、Tuesday、Wednesday 各一次,Kipling 三的魔法。

questions.sentence: The Camel will not work.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:The → Camel → will → not → work。will not = 拒絕的意志,比 does not 更強。

questions.sentence: The Three are tired of him.
questions.question: How do the Three feel?
questions.explanationZh: tired of him = 受夠他了。馬、狗、牛三個都氣到不行。

questions.sentence: They must do his work too.
questions.question: Whose work do they also do?
questions.explanationZh: the Camel's work = 駱駝的工作。他不做,別人就得多做一份。

questions.sentence: The Three feel angry and tired.
questions.question: How do the Three feel now?
questions.explanationZh: angry = 生氣的。多做一份本來不屬於自己的活,誰不氣?

questions.sentence: Why do the Three feel angry?
questions.question: Why are the Three angry?
questions.explanationZh: they do extra work = 他們做了多出來的工作。駱駝偷懶,代價在別人身上。

storyBeat: The Three complain to Man (三隻動物去告狀)

questions.sentence: At the end of the day they went to Man.
questions.question: Whom did they go to?
questions.explanationZh: Man = 人類。三隻動物去找他們的老闆告狀。

questions.sentence: They told him about the lazy Camel.
questions.question: Whom did they tell about?
questions.explanationZh: about the Camel = 關於駱駝。三隻動物把駱駝偷懶的事全講出來。

questions.sentence: The Camel will not work for us.
questions.question: Which animal do the three blame?
questions.explanationZh: Camel = 駱駝。/ˈkæməl/,結尾 -mel,跟 came /keɪm/、calm /kɑːm/ 母音不同。

questions.sentence: Man hears them and frowns.
questions.question: How does Man look?
questions.explanationZh: frown = 皺眉。聽到駱駝偷懶,人類臉一沉。

questions.sentence: The Three feel hopeful now.
questions.question: How do the Three feel?
questions.explanationZh: hopeful = 有希望的。告完狀,他們想:這下子有人會處理駱駝了。

questions.sentence: Why do the Three tell Man about the Camel?
questions.question: Why do they tell Man?
questions.explanationZh: they need help = 他們需要幫忙。三個都做不完工作,自己處理不了駱駝,只能找老大。

storyBeat: Man calls the Djinn of All Deserts (人召喚精靈)

questions.sentence: Man calls the Djinn of All Deserts.
questions.question: Whom does Man call?
questions.explanationZh: Djinn = 沙漠精靈(阿拉伯故事裡的神靈)。/dʒɪn/,只有他能管沙漠裡的駱駝。

questions.sentence: The Djinn is in charge of all the deserts.
questions.question: What is the Djinn in charge of?
questions.explanationZh: in charge of = 管理。所有沙漠都歸他管,連懶駱駝也躲不掉。

questions.sentence: The Djinn is a magic person.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:The → Djinn → is → a → magic → person。magic = 有魔法的。small / loud 是干擾。

questions.sentence: Man asks for help with the Camel.
questions.question: Whom does Man ask about?
questions.explanationZh: about the Camel = 為了駱駝。人類找精靈,只為了這隻不肯工作的傢伙。

questions.sentence: The Djinn listens with a calm face.
questions.question: How does the Djinn look?
questions.explanationZh: calm = 平靜的。精靈一聽就懂,不慌不忙。

questions.sentence: Why does Man call the Djinn?
questions.question: Why call the Djinn?
questions.explanationZh: only magic can fix this = 只有魔法能解決。普通人勸不動的懶,得靠超自然力量。

storyBeat: The Djinn rolls in dust and finds the Camel (精靈出場)

questions.sentence: The Djinn rolls up in a cloud of dust.
questions.question: What is the Djinn in?
questions.explanationZh: a cloud of dust = 一團塵土。精靈出場的招牌特效,Kipling 寫得很有畫面。

questions.sentence: He goes across the desert.
questions.question: Where does the Djinn go?
questions.explanationZh: across the desert = 穿過沙漠。沙漠再大,精靈一陣風就到。

questions.sentence: The Camel looks at his own reflection.
questions.question: What is the Camel looking at?
questions.explanationZh: reflection = 倒影。駱駝對著水裡的自己看,什麼活都不幹。

questions.sentence: He stares at a pool of water.
questions.question: What does the Camel stare at?
questions.explanationZh: pool = 水窪。/puːl/,跟 pull /pʊl/、pole /poʊl/ 母音都不一樣。

questions.sentence: The Djinn looks serious now.
questions.question: How does the Djinn look?
questions.explanationZh: serious = 嚴肅的。看到駱駝對著水照鏡子發呆,精靈臉色一變。

questions.sentence: The Camel does nothing at all.
questions.question: What does the Camel do?
questions.explanationZh: nothing at all = 什麼都沒做。連動都不動,真的把懶字寫滿全身。

storyBeat: The Djinn warns: "My long and bubbling friend" (警告)

questions.sentence: My long and bubbling friend.
questions.question: How is the Camel's neck?
questions.explanationZh: long = 長的。Kipling 用 "long and bubbling" 形容駱駝,長脖子又會冒泡。

questions.sentence: The Djinn calls the Camel "friend".
questions.question: What word does the Djinn use?
questions.explanationZh: friend = 朋友。精靈用客氣的字,但語氣其實在警告。

questions.sentence: What is this I hear of your doing no work?
questions.question: What does the Djinn ask?
questions.explanationZh: no work = 不工作。精靈一句話切到重點:聽說你都不做事?

questions.sentence: The Camel only says, "Humph!"
questions.question: What does the Camel say to the Djinn?
questions.explanationZh: Humph = 哼。連對精靈也用同一招,駱駝不知道接下來會發生什麼。

questions.sentence: Why does the Djinn use a polite word?
questions.question: Why "my friend"?
options: he is kind before he is firm
questions.explanationZh: kind before firm = 先客氣後強硬。精靈先給機會,駱駝如果改,可能不必受罰。

questions.sentence: What is wrong with saying "Humph!" to the Djinn?
questions.question: Why is this dangerous?
questions.explanationZh: can do magic = 會魔法。對普通動物哼一聲沒事,對沙漠魔法師哼,後果就不一樣了。

storyBeat: The Camel just says "Humph!" (頑固)

questions.sentence: The Camel says "Humph!" again.
questions.question: What does the Camel say?
questions.explanationZh: Humph = 哼。第四次了,Kipling 終於要把這個字變成可見的東西。

questions.sentence: The Djinn sits down with his chin in his hand.
questions.question: What does the Djinn do?
questions.explanationZh: sits down = 坐下。精靈不急,坐下來慢慢想辦法。

questions.sentence: He begins to think a Great Magic.
questions.question: What does the Djinn think?
questions.explanationZh: a Great Magic = 一個強大的魔法。Kipling 大寫 G 跟 M,表示這不是普通法術。

questions.sentence: The Camel feels very proud.
questions.question: How does the Camel feel?
questions.explanationZh: proud = 得意的。連精靈都被他哼走,他覺得自己最強。

questions.sentence: He has no idea what comes next.
questions.question: What does the Camel know?
questions.explanationZh: no idea = 不知道。駱駝一點都不知道接下來會發生什麼事。

questions.sentence: Why does the Djinn sit and think?
questions.question: Why think first?
questions.explanationZh: magic needs planning = 魔法要先想好。亂用會出錯,所以精靈先靜下來。

storyBeat: Magic: a humph grows on his back (駝峰長出來)

questions.sentence: The Camel's flat back begins to swell.
questions.question: What happens to his back?
questions.explanationZh: swell = 膨脹、鼓起來。駱駝平平的背開始凸起來,像吹氣球。

questions.sentence: A big humph grows on his back.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:A → big → humph → grows → on → his → back。grow = 長出來,his "humph" 終於變成身上的東西。

questions.sentence: The Camel cannot say humph now.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:The → Camel → cannot → say → humph → now。他的「哼」變成背上的駝峰,叫不出來了。

questions.sentence: We now call it a hump.
questions.question: What do we call it now?
questions.explanationZh: hump = 駝峰(較禮貌的拼法,humph 是駱駝自己造的字)。

questions.sentence: The Camel feels shocked and confused.
questions.question: How does the Camel feel?
questions.explanationZh: shocked = 震驚的。剛才還在「哼」,現在背上突然多一塊,駱駝整個傻了。

questions.sentence: Why is the hump called a "humph" first?
questions.question: Why "humph" before "hump"?
questions.explanationZh: sound became the thing = 聲音變成東西。駱駝講過 N 次的「哼」,精靈用魔法把它變成背上的肉,字也跟著變。

storyBeat: The Camel must work three days without eating (懲罰 + 補課)

questions.sentence: That humph is your very own.
questions.question: Whose is the humph?
questions.explanationZh: your very own = 你自己的。精靈說:你哼出來的,自己背一輩子。

questions.sentence: From this day on you will work.
questions.question: What must the Camel do now?
questions.explanationZh: work = 工作。逃了三天,精靈說從今天開始得動了。

questions.sentence: You will work three days without eating.
questions.question: What can the Camel not do?
questions.explanationZh: eating = 吃。/ˈiːtɪŋ/,跟 eight /eɪt/ 母音不同。三天不吃,聽起來就餓。

questions.sentence: The humph will feed you.
questions.question: What does the humph do?
questions.explanationZh: feed = 餵養。駝峰存的養分讓駱駝三天不吃也能撐。

questions.sentence: Now come out and behave.
questions.question: What must the Camel do?
questions.explanationZh: behave = 守規矩。精靈最後一句:出來,別再耍懶。

questions.sentence: Why three days without eating?
questions.question: Why three days?
options: he missed three days of work
questions.explanationZh: missed three days = 漏掉三天工作。Monday、Tuesday、Wednesday 三天偷懶,精靈讓他用駝峰自己補。

storyBeat: 蘆葦與橡樹 ①:橡樹笑蘆葦軟弱

questions.sentence: Grandma turns to a small story now.
questions.question: What does Grandma do?
questions.explanationZh: a small story = 小故事。主菜結束,奶奶接一個短篇。

questions.sentence: A tall oak stands by a small reed.
questions.question: Which tree is tall?
questions.explanationZh: oak = 橡樹(高大)。reed = 蘆葦(細長)。兩個站在一起,差距明顯。

questions.sentence: The oak laughs at the reed.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:The → oak → laughs → at → the → reed。橡樹覺得自己強,瞧不起細細的蘆葦。

questions.sentence: "You are too weak," says the oak.
questions.question: What does the oak call the reed?
questions.explanationZh: weak = 軟弱的。橡樹用最傷人的字罵蘆葦。

questions.sentence: The reed does not answer back.
questions.question: How does the reed respond?
questions.explanationZh: stays quiet = 保持安靜。蘆葦不爭,只是隨風搖。

storyBeat: 蘆葦與橡樹 ②:大風吹倒橡樹,蘆葦彎腰存活

questions.sentence: A big storm comes that night.
questions.question: What comes that night?
questions.explanationZh: a big storm = 大風暴。橡樹本來最神氣,風暴一來考驗開始。

questions.sentence: The oak stands stiff and breaks.
questions.question: What happens to the oak?
questions.explanationZh: break = 折斷。橡樹硬撐,風太大就斷了。

questions.sentence: The reed bends low and lives.
questions.question: What does the reed do?
questions.explanationZh: bend = 彎腰。蘆葦軟,風來低頭,風過再站直。

questions.sentence: Now the reed is still tall.
questions.question: Who is left standing?
questions.explanationZh: the reed = 蘆葦。誰活下來,就是誰真強。

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "Yielding can be strong."
questions.question: What is the lesson?
questions.explanationZh: yielding = 退讓、彎腰。奶奶輕輕說:有時候軟一點,反而活得久 — 跟駱駝的硬脾氣剛好相反。

storyBeat: 老鼠開會 ①:老鼠們提議在貓脖子上掛鈴

questions.sentence: The mice meet at night.
questions.question: When do the mice meet?
questions.explanationZh: at night = 晚上。貓睡了,老鼠才敢開會。

questions.sentence: They are afraid of the big cat.
questions.question: What are they afraid of?
questions.explanationZh: afraid of the cat = 怕貓。每天躲來躲去,大家都受夠了。

questions.sentence: Let us put a bell on the cat.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:Let → us → put → a → bell → on → the → cat。小老鼠的點子,聽到鈴聲就能逃。

questions.sentence: Then we can hear the cat coming.
questions.question: What does the bell let them do?
questions.explanationZh: hear the cat = 聽見貓。鈴一響就跑,聽起來完美。

questions.sentence: All the mice clap and cheer.
questions.question: How do the mice react?
questions.explanationZh: excited = 興奮的。大家拍手叫好,以為問題解決了。

storyBeat: 老鼠開會 ②:沒有老鼠敢去掛

questions.sentence: An old mouse asks one question.
questions.question: Who speaks next?
questions.explanationZh: an old mouse = 一隻老老鼠。最老的那隻打破興奮,問了一個重點問題。

questions.sentence: "Who will put the bell on the cat?"
questions.question: What does he ask?
questions.explanationZh: who will do it = 誰要做?最簡單的問題,卻最難答。

questions.sentence: No mouse says a word.
questions.question: How many mice answer?
questions.explanationZh: none = 一隻都沒有。剛才還拍手的老鼠,現在沒人敢出聲。

questions.sentence: The mice all look down.
questions.question: How do the mice feel?
questions.explanationZh: ashamed = 慚愧的。好點子說得起勁,要做時誰都不舉手。

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "An idea is not a plan."
questions.question: What is the lesson?
questions.explanationZh: plans need doers = 計畫需要有人做。光想點子沒用,要有人真的去做才算數。

storyBeat: 奶奶合上書,{dogName} 已經睡著

questions.sentence: Grandma closes the old book.
questions.question: What does Grandma do?
questions.explanationZh: closes = 合上。今晚的故事說完了。

questions.sentence: {dogName} is already asleep.
questions.question: How is {dogName} now?
questions.explanationZh: asleep = 睡著了。{dogName} 在駝峰長出來那段就閉上眼了。

questions.sentence: Her chest rises slow and soft.
questions.question: How does {dogName} breathe?
questions.explanationZh: slow = 慢的。胸口輕輕起伏,睡得很沉。

questions.sentence: Grandma smiles and turns off the lamp.
questions.question: What does Grandma turn off?
questions.explanationZh: turn off the lamp = 關燈。她不吵醒 {dogName},只是輕輕關掉燈。

questions.sentence: The room feels quiet and safe.
questions.question: How does the room feel?
questions.explanationZh: quiet = 安靜的。沒有風沒有書聲,只剩呼吸聲。

storyBeat: {catName} 跳下矮牆,沙漠的風散去

questions.sentence: I jump down from the wall.
questions.question: What do I do?
questions.explanationZh: jump down = 跳下來。故事聽完,我輕輕從矮牆跳到街上。

questions.sentence: The desert wind is gone.
questions.question: What about the wind?
questions.explanationZh: gone = 不見了。沙漠的風只在故事裡,現在又是平常的夜。

questions.sentence: I walk back to my corner.
questions.question: Where does {catName} walk back?
questions.explanationZh: corner = 角落。我的固定睡覺位置,跟雨夜那章一樣。

questions.sentence: I feel a little wiser tonight.
questions.question: How do I feel?
questions.explanationZh: wiser = 更有智慧的。聽完駱駝故事我想:偷懶很爽,但代價是一輩子背個包。

questions.sentence: I will come back tomorrow night.
questions.question: When will I be back?
questions.explanationZh: tomorrow night = 明晚。每天的儀式,明晚還有新故事。

storyBeat: 今晚的關鍵字 + {dogName} 問奶奶

questions.sentence: Desert and animal words
questions.question: Tap the pairs
questions.explanationZh: 四個沙漠關鍵字:camel 駱駝、desert 沙漠、sand 沙、djinn 精靈。Kipling 故事的舞台。

questions.sentence: Work words
questions.question: Tap the pairs
questions.explanationZh: 三個動詞 + 一個形容詞:trot 馬、fetch 狗、plough 牛、lazy 駱駝。三隻動物的工作 vs. 駱駝的態度。

questions.sentence: Aesop side words
questions.question: Tap the pairs
questions.explanationZh: 兩個小故事的關鍵字:reed/oak(彎腰勝硬撐)、bell/mouse(點子需要有人做)。

questions.sentence: {dogName} wakes up and asks Grandma.
questions.question: What does {dogName} do?
questions.explanationZh: asks Grandma = 問奶奶。{dogName} 醒過來還有疑問,搖搖尾巴開口。

questions.sentence: Why didn't the Camel want to work?
questions.question: What is {dogName}'s first question?
questions.explanationZh: Why no work? = 為什麼不工作?{dogName} 對「不工作」這件事最好奇,柴犬每天都很愛動。

questions.sentence: Grandma says he was lazy.
questions.question: What word does Grandma use?
questions.explanationZh: lazy = 懶的。奶奶用最簡單的字回答 {dogName}。

questions.sentence: Did the hump hurt the Camel?
questions.question: What is {dogName}'s second question?
questions.explanationZh: Did it hurt? = 痛不痛?柴犬有同理心,聽到駝峰長出來會替駱駝擔心。

questions.sentence: Grandma says it was magic, not pain.
questions.question: Did it hurt?
questions.explanationZh: No, it was magic = 不痛,是魔法。奶奶安撫 {dogName},Kipling 的駝峰是 Djinn 變的,不是受傷。

questions.sentence: The hump keeps food for him.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 順序:The → hump → keeps → food → for → him。奶奶解釋駝峰像背在身上的便當。water / ice 是干擾。

questions.sentence: {dogName} feels glad for the Camel.
questions.question: How does {dogName} feel now?
questions.explanationZh: glad = 高興的。聽到駱駝不痛,{dogName} 才放心搖搖尾巴。

questions.sentence: The lesson is: do not be lazy.
questions.question: What is the lesson of the tale?
questions.explanationZh: do not be lazy = 不要懶惰。Kipling 的 moral,但奶奶說得溫柔不嚴肅。

questions.sentence: What did {catName} learn tonight?
questions.question: What did {catName} learn?
questions.explanationZh: work matters = 工作有意義。流浪貓的 {catName} 邊聽邊想:我每天找飯吃,也是一種工作。

questions.sentence: What did the reed teach us?
questions.question: Lesson from the reed?
questions.explanationZh: bend, do not break = 彎腰,不要折斷。蘆葦活下來是因為它柔,不是因為它弱。

questions.sentence: What did the mice forget?
questions.question: Lesson from the mice?
questions.explanationZh: ideas need doers = 點子需要有人做。喊得開心,沒人舉手就只是空話。

questions.sentence: Good night, my little friend.
questions.question: What greeting closes the night?
questions.explanationZh: good night = 晚安。奶奶把書合上,{dogName} 已經睡著,{catName} 也準備跳下牆。
